parts.ui: NativeWind 4 (Tailwind on RN) + custom HUD components
data_persistence: react-native-mmkv (auth, prefs, processing checkpoints, detection-config cache)
parts.media: @wokcito/ffmpeg-kit-react-native, expo-file-system, expo-document-picker, OpenCV via JSI bridge (pending)

parts.ui: Tailwind CSS 4 + shadcn/ui (Base UI primitives) + Lucide icons
data_persistence: Firestore via firebase-admin (server) + firebase client SDK
parts.auth: Firebase Auth (email/password + Google) → Firebase Admin sessionCookie (7-day, httpOnly, secure in prod)
parts.payments: Stripe SDK 22 (apiVersion '2026-03-25.dahlia') — Checkout, Customer Portal, webhooks (invoice.paid, subscription.deleted, payment_failed)

parts.purpose: Cross-language source of truth (JSON Schema) + auto-generated Zod modules + shared TS/ESLint configs

integration_points.details: Stripe Checkout Session, Billing Portal Session. apiVersion 2026-03-25.dahlia.
POST /api/webhooks/stripe. Events: invoice.paid, customer.subscription.deleted, invoice.payment_failed. Signature verified, idempotency via stripe_events/{event.id}.
Server-only writes to users/{uid} and stripe_events/{id}. Client writes denied by firestore.rules.
ID token from client traded for httpOnly session cookie via POST /api/auth/session.
Email/password + Google sign-in. AuthBypass env var available for dev.
Reads users/{uid} for subscription gate (status + current_period_end). Reads detection_config/latest for tunable detection params.
Emits map_config.json. Validated against contracts/map-config.schema.json by tooling itself (jsonschema).

integration_points.protocol: indirect (Firestore detection_config OR Metro bundle — Phase 6 decision)
integration_points.details: Currently mobile fetches detection_config/latest from Firestore; bundle alternative considered.
Web declares its own Zod schemas in src/lib/schemas/ and does NOT yet import @warden/contracts. Phase 6 candidate for unification.

open_decisions: users/{uid} schema: drop legacy isPaid, or formalize as denormalized convenience derived from status?
map_config.json runtime delivery: keep Firestore-fetched (current) or bundle as Metro asset?
Same Firebase project for web + mobile? (apparent yes; assert in Phase 6 architecture)
Stripe API version pin (2026-03-25.dahlia) vs installed types (2026-04-22.dahlia) — bump or freeze?
Migrate apps/mobile auth to @react-native-firebase to escape getReactNativePersistence deprecation?
